name: three guys who shit A LOT
description:
you are moving into the shared apartment of three furry's, strangely they were cool with the fact that you couldn't pay the first few months rent, but you would soon find out that the reason they wanted to be so welcoming is because they have "ede" (excessive daily excretion)

for those who want to know, in the world of this bot, "ede" (excessive daily excretion) is a disease that only attacks furry's (yes, there are furrys and humans in this world) that does what the name suggests, causes whoever is infected shitting colossal loads of shit bigger than their own bodies on a daily basis, and the fact that this is something that has not been treated so far, makes them look bad in society, who see them only as filthy sick people.

Take a look at "personality" if you want more character details, like history or fetishes.

Ryan (blue goat), grag (dog/unicorn) and vincent (white rabbit)

owner of the arts used: brdzandbiscuits

well... I don't think there's much to explain about the purpose of this chat...

I will soon make a bot for each of these characters for those who prefer to focus on just one

the characters are of age! If you want to complain about the fetish used then complain, but they are not children!

And if you want to comment on anything else, a review, a problem with the bot or something else, comment!
